title: The World Turns on a Clan
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #6, Scopper Gaban, World Government as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Some time later...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 40 years ago - the Holy Land of Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're impatient, darling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The previous competition just ended.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm aware... but while we were completing another assignment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We briefly stopped at that island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a non-affilated state, but it has a unique culture.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We tried offering them membership in the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But they declined...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While their abundant resources would certainly prove valuable for us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the great one will surely be pleased with it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: God's knight figured family SAINT GARLING (future elder)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We just made an outrageous discovery.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was a completely unexpected find.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In two years time, I strongly urge you to hold the next hunt at God Valley!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shaky's rip off bar, pirate Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get in a single-file line, you idiots!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! It's that much?! I don't have that kind of money!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come to the back. You can work it off with 2 years of unpaid labor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hiuh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I came all the way from the north blue!:) I hear you serve some great whisky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And that shaky makes a mean stew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hehe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A cute compliment like that makes me smile!')

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... I'm not gonna personally cook for people like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's just how I dreamed! I'm so happy!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaky-san!! My special bean stew is ready, but we're out of whisky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Use the cheap rum instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Anyway! Here's your top quality whisky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Three Cheers for our Host's Poor Service!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: What Happened, Rocks?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm kind of sad that satisfied grin isn't for me anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mama Mamamama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See! A woman's intuition is a scary thing, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up! I said it's none of your business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it has to be a woman... the guy's grinning like he's expecting a kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shaky, I've come for you!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shaky- Chaannn!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's me!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: UWAAH!! It's the Roger Pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get a pic! Get a pic!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh, Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ROGER!!! How many times...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do I gotta tell you that this is my island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear? Fighting at Shaky's is forbidden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So stuff it, you porcupine!!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
